summary: Comprehensive testing of REQ-3: IP & Room Management features. All 26 backend API tests passed (100%). All frontend UI elements verified working including Rooms page floor map, Treatment Packages tab, Add Room/Package dialogs, and Patient Details Admit as IP dialog.

minor.issue: Some older rooms missing 'floor' field in response (defaulting to 'Ground' in grouping)

issues: Console warning: Missing `Description` or `aria-describedby={undefined}` for {DialogContent} - accessibility improvement recommended

passed_tests: Backend: Admin login success
Backend: POST /api/rooms - create room with floor, type, rate
Backend: GET /api/rooms - list all rooms
Backend: GET /api/rooms/overview - floor-wise overview with occupancy stats
Backend: GET /api/rooms/available - list available rooms only
Backend: PUT /api/rooms/{id} - update room details
Backend: PUT /api/rooms/{id} - 404 for non-existent room
Backend: DELETE /api/rooms/{id} - delete room
Backend: DELETE /api/rooms/{id} - 404 for non-existent room
Backend: POST /api/treatment-packages - create package with therapies, cost, duration
Backend: GET /api/treatment-packages - list active packages
Backend: PUT /api/treatment-packages/{id} - update package
Backend: PUT /api/treatment-packages/{id} - 404 for non-existent package
Backend: DELETE /api/treatment-packages/{id} - deactivate package
Backend: POST /api/patients/{id}/convert-to-ip - convert OP to IP with all details
Backend: Room becomes occupied after IP conversion
Backend: DELETE /api/rooms/{id} - 400 for occupied room (cannot delete)
Backend: GET /api/admissions - list all admissions with attender/consent details
Backend: GET /api/admissions/patient/{id} - patient-specific admissions
Backend: GET /api/advance-payments/{patient_id} - advance payment records
Backend: POST /api/patients/{id}/convert-to-ip - 400 for already occupied room
Backend: Room overview by_floor structure verified
Backend: Room overview by_type structure verified
Frontend: Rooms page loads with summary cards (Total, Occupied, Available, Occupancy Rate)
Frontend: Floor Map tab shows rooms grouped by floor (Ground, 1st Floor)
Frontend: Room cards show room number, type badge, daily rate, occupancy status (green/red)
Frontend: Occupied room shows patient name and PID
Frontend: Treatment Packages tab shows packages with therapy tags, cost, duration, inclusions
Frontend: Add Room dialog has all fields (room number, type, floor, rate, description)
Frontend: Add Package dialog has all fields (name, duration, therapies, room type, cost, description)
Frontend: Patient Details page shows 'Admit as IP' button for OP patients
Frontend: Admit as IP dialog has room selector, package selector, attender fields, advance payment, consent checkbox
critical_code_review_comments: DialogContent components missing aria-describedby for accessibility - add DialogDescription or aria-describedby prop (minor, non-blocking)
seed_data_creation: Test rooms and packages created during backend testing with TEST- prefix. Test patient 'TEST IP Conversion Patient' created and admitted to room IP-TEST-F5BB.
context_for_next_testing_agent: REQ-3 IP & Room Management features fully functional. Room CRUD working (POST/GET/PUT/DELETE). Treatment Package CRUD working. OP to IP conversion working with room assignment, attender details, advance payment, consent, and package selection. Room occupancy tracking working - occupied rooms show patient info and cannot be deleted. Admission records and advance payments stored correctly. Floor map shows rooms grouped by floor with color-coded occupancy status. Some TEST- prefixed rooms exist from testing.

details.create: POST /api/rooms with room_number, room_type, floor, daily_rate, description
POST /api/treatment-packages with name, duration_days, therapies[], total_cost, includes_room/food/medicines
details.delete: DELETE /api/treatment-packages/{id} (soft delete - sets status to inactive)

details.fields: room_number, attender_name/relation/phone, advance_amount, consent_given, package_id, notes
details.effects: Patient type changed to IP, room marked occupied, admission record created, advance payment tracked

details.fields: patient info, room info, attender details, consent, package, advance amount, admission date

details.summary_cards: Total Rooms, Occupied, Available, Occupancy Rate
details.floor_map: Rooms grouped by floor with color-coded occupancy (green=available, red=occupied)
details.room_cards: Room number, type badge, daily rate, patient info if occupied
details.treatment_packages: Package cards with therapy tags, cost, duration, inclusions (Room/Food/Medicines)

details.room_selector: Dropdown with available rooms showing room number, type, floor, rate
details.consent_checkbox: Patient/Attender consent for treatment and admission
